description: Curated pre-made scheduled-job prompts for clauck. Browse by category or tags; ask Claude to copy one into your scheduled-jobs directory to install.

jobs.name: morning-brief
jobs.one_line: Weekday morning digest: unread Slack mentions, today's calendar, and open Jira tickets in one post.

requires.mcps: Slack + Google Calendar + Atlassian (any subset works; missing sections are skipped)
setup: Set your Slack DM channel ID in the prompt.
Optionally narrow the Jira search to a specific project.

jobs.name: github-pr-digest
jobs.one_line: Weekday digest of PRs needing your attention: reviews requested, stale drafts, recently merged.

requires.mcps: GitHub + Slack (or switch to local file)
setup: Set your Slack DM channel ID in the prompt.

jobs.name: inbox-zero-assist
jobs.one_line: End-of-day scan of Gmail threads unread for 48h+. Suggests actions in a local file. Never sends.

setup: Optionally adjust cron time to match your end of workday.
Optionally narrow to specific Gmail labels.

jobs.name: daily-verify
jobs.one_line: Daily MCP-surface health check posted to your choice of Slack/Discord/Jira/Gmail/local file.

requires.mcps: at least one of: Slack, Discord, Jira, Gmail (OR none in local-file mode)
setup: Pick ONE destination and fill in channel ID / ticket key / recipient.

jobs.name: downloads-triage
jobs.one_line: Fires when new files land in ~/Downloads. Categorizes and suggests destinations.

jobs.name: workspace-cleanup
jobs.one_line: Weekly scan of Desktop and Documents for stale files, generic names, and large files. Report only.

jobs.name: module-demo
jobs.one_line: Reference module-format marketplace job. Demonstrates the <name>/JOB.md directory shape for multi-file jobs.

setup: Copy this directory as a starting point when building multi-file jobs.
Add stage files (<stage>.md) and declare them via producers/consumers on JOB.md.

jobs.name: event-monitor
jobs.one_line: Time-bounded health checker: runs every 15 min inside a custom window, alerts on failure, auto-expires when done.
jobs.schedule: every 15 min within a configurable time window (auto-expires)
jobs.monthly_cost_usd_approx: bounded by window duration; ~$0.24 per 6-hour event

requires.mcps: none (local file fallback) or Slack (for push alerts)
setup: Set valid_after to your window start (ISO 8601).
Set expires_after to your window end — job auto-disables when it passes.
Set HEALTH_URL input default to your endpoint.
Optionally set ALERT_CHANNEL to a Slack DM or channel ID.

jobs.name: git-commit-nudge
jobs.one_line: Every 4 hours, check repos for uncommitted changes or unpushed commits. Nudge via local file.

setup: Change REPOS_ROOT in the prompt body to your git repos parent directory.

jobs.name: dynamic-context-demo
jobs.one_line: Reference job demonstrating {{cmd:}} inline bash templating — injects live date and git state into the prompt body.

setup: Change the repo path in the prompt body to a git repo you want to inspect.
Add your own {{cmd:}} markers to inject other live shell context.

jobs.name: github-issue-watcher
jobs.one_line: Daily watcher for a single GitHub issue: alerts on close, PR linkage, or label changes. Installed automatically by `clauck report`.

requires.mcps: none required (Slack optional for push notifications)
setup: Set name: to something unique, e.g. gh-watch-123
Set ISSUE_URL default to the GitHub issue URL to watch.
Optionally set NOTIFY_CHANNEL to a Slack DM channel ID for push notifications.

jobs.name: work-journal
jobs.one_line: Weekday end-of-day work journal from git activity — accumulates context across runs to surface patterns.

setup: Set REPOS_ROOT to your git repos parent directory.
Optionally change OUTPUT_FILE path.

jobs.name: release-monitor
jobs.one_line: Bounded post-release watcher — monitors a GitHub repo for new issues during a release window, then auto-disables.
jobs.schedule: every 6 hours (configurable), bounded by valid_after + expires_after

setup: Set REPO to owner/repo format.
Set valid_after to your release date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Set expires_after to 7 days after release (YYYY-MM-DD).

jobs.name: standup-gather
jobs.one_line: Pipeline stage — collects git commits from the last 24h. Consumed by the standup job.
jobs.schedule: ad-hoc only (pipeline stage; fired by standup job)

setup: Set REPOS_ROOT to your git repos parent directory.
Install alongside standup.md — these two jobs form a pipeline.

jobs.name: standup
jobs.one_line: Weekday standup generator — pulls git activity via the standup-gather pipeline and writes a formatted standup note.

setup: Install alongside standup-gather.md — these two jobs form a pipeline.
Set REPOS_ROOT in standup-gather.md.
Optionally change OUTPUT_FILE path.
